transcript: She'll grow up and put on her suits and try to change the world Come on Harry, we wanna say goodnight to you! Holding you back, gravity's holding you back I want you to hold out the palm of your hand Why don't we leave it at that? Nothing to say And everything gets in the way Seems you cannot be replaced And I don't wanna stay Oh In this world It's just us Thank you. We'll be right back. You know it's not the same as it was As it was As it was This little daisy girl Wasn't made to break
